reasoning: The control SC-7 (8) requires routing traffic through authenticated proxy servers, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that ingress traffic is controlled and authenticated. This can be achieved through NetworkPolicies that deny all ingress by default, enabling TLS for Ingress resources to ensure encrypted communication, requiring authentication on ingress controllers, and using service mesh features like mutual TLS (mTLS) for traffic encryption and authentication within the cluster.
title: Boundary Protection | Route Traffic to Authenticated Proxy Servers
